abstract.text: Types that conform to VariantStorable can be stored in a Variant and can be extracted
back out of a Variant.

inlineContent.text: As a convenience, SwiftGodot provides conformances for some native Swift types like
String, Bool, Int, Float below, but you can also add your own conformances.
Every VariantStorable must be able to convert to an underlying
type which is one that can be stored natively in a
